rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption shrinks the local tax base for M&O taxes levied to pay district shares of lease-purchase agreements. Section 46.003(b), cross-referenced in subsection (b), likely requires consequential amendment to adjust state assistance calculations for the reduced taxable value.
quote: taxes levied for purposes of maintenance and operations that are necessary to pay a district's share of the payments under a lease-purchase agreement for which the district receives state assistance under this subchapter are considered to be bond taxes
_note: Conflict is indirect: §46.004 does not directly reference the homestead exemption amount, but the increased exemption reduces the local tax base supporting lease-purchase payments, and §46.003(b) (cross-referenced in subsection (b)) likely needs consequential amendment.
